---
title: Tentative Program
---

**Date**: October 13, Monday  
**Location**: see [Workshops program on UbiComp website](https://www.ubicomp.org/ubicomp-iswc-2025/workshops-and-tutorials/)

</br>

+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|Time (Espoo, Finland local time) | Event                                                                                                        |
+=================================+==============================================================================================================+
|15:15 - 15:30                    | Opening and Welcome                                                                                          |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|15:30 - 16:20                    | Keynote #1: [Simone Fischer-Hubner](https://www.kau.se/forskare/simone-fischer-hubner) Karlstad University   |
|                                 |                                                                                                              |
|                                 | Title: _Enhancing privacy and trust for Data Analytics_                                                      |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|16:20 - 16:45                    | Paper presentations                                                                                          |
|                                 |                                                                                                              |
|                                 | - Blue Mondays and Happy Meals: Investigating the impact of Contextual Factors on Mood States                |
|                                 | - MakOne: Behavioural Data of University Students’ Smart Devices in Uganda                                   |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|16:45 - 17:15                    | Coffee break                                                                                                 |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|17:15 - 18:05                    | Keynote #2: [Özlem Durmaz Incel](https://ozlemdurmazincel.github.io/) - University of Twente                 |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|18:05 - 18:40                    | Discussion and brainstorming among attendees and workshop organizers                                         |
|                                 |                                                                                                              |
|                                 | Potential topics                                                                                             |
|                                 |                                                                                                              |
|                                 | - experience working with DiversityOne                                                                       |
|                                 | - potential future analysis and applications                                                                 |
|                                 | - additional datasets                                                                                        |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|18:40 - 18:45                    | Closing remarks                                                                                              |
+---------------------------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

: {.striped .hover}
